chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1550 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 20-03-2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioners. Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for respondents-SEPCO. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G. ***** Learned counsel for petitioners submits that in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Pakistan Electric Power Company v. Syed Salahuddin and others (2022 SCMR 991), this petition filed against the Power Company is not maintainable. Hence, the petitioners would file relevant proceedings before a proper forum for redressal of their grievance, but the limitation consumed in filing this petition and its pendency may be condoned in terms of section 14 of the Limitation Act, 1908. The other side has no objection to it. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. However, if the petitioners intend to file any proceedings before any forum for redressal of their grievance, the limitation which has been consumed here shall be condoned and the time shall be counted from today. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
